mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weather_log (intersection_id, temperature, humidity, wind_speed, wind_direction, precipitation, precipitation_type, sky_condition, visibility, collected_at) VALUES (#{intersectionId}, #{temperature}, #{humidity}, #{windSpeed}, #{windDirection}, #{precipitation}, #{precipitationType}, #{skyCondition}, #{visibility}, #{collectedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT weather_id, intersection_id, temperature, humidity, wind_speed, wind_direction, precipitation, precipitation_type, sky_condition, visibility, collected_at, created_at FROM weather_log WHERE intersection_id = #{intersectionId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
